description: A research synthesis — question, search results from hybrid retrieval, and an LLM-generated answer grounded in artifact evidence. Produced by Sage's research and ask tools.

context_schema.question: string — the research question or query
context_schema.answer: string — LLM-synthesized answer grounded in the sources
context_schema.sources: object[] — [{artifact_id: string, excerpt: string, score: number}] evidence used
context_schema.model: string? — LLM model used for synthesis

ui.label: Research
ui.description: Research synthesis — question, grounded answer, and source evidence.
